segments.text: I cry out to God; I cry out to God, and he will hear me.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: In the day of my trouble I seek the Lord; in the night my hand is stretched out without wearying; my soul refuses to be comforted.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: When I remember God, I moan; when I meditate, my spirit faints.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You hold my eyelids open; I am so troubled that I cannot speak.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I consider the days of old, the years long ago.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I said, 'Let me remember my song in the night; let me meditate in my heart.'
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Will the Lord spurn forever, and never again be favorable?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Has his steadfast love forever ceased? Are his promises at an end for all time?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: for evermore: Heb. to generation and generation?

segments.text: Has God forgotten to be gracious? Has he in anger shut up his compassion?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: And I say, 'I will appeal to this, to the years of the right hand of the Most High.'
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will remember the deeds of the LORD; yes, I will remember your wonders of old.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will ponder all your work, and meditate on your mighty deeds.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Your way, O God, is holy. What god is great like our God?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You are the God who works wonders; you have made known your might among the peoples.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You with your arm redeemed your people, the children of Jacob and Joseph.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: When the waters saw you, O God, when the waters saw you, they were afraid;
indeed, the deep trembled.
The clouds poured out water; the skies gave forth thunder; your arrows flashed on every side.

footnotes: poured…: Heb. were poured forth with water

segments.text: The crash of your thunder was in the whirlwind; your lightnings lighted up the world; the earth trembled and shook.
Your way was through the sea, your path through the great waters, yet your footprints were unseen.
You led your people like a flock by the hand of Moses and Aaron.
